DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: DEFT ORAL MOT TO CONTINUE TO SUBPOENA WITNESSES IS DENIED BY JUDGE TOMAR MASON.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARQUIS, RANDY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1401 24TH AVENUE #6, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JAN-02-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY. DEFT WAIVES RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT OR ACCOUNTING. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF TO PROVIDE NEUTRAL REFERENCE. IF DEFT COMPLIES W/STIP, PLTF WILL SET ASIDE JUDGMNT & DISM. ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED.
